content.en:
There weren't any six or seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors before the Dao Mountain Realm, and these corpses had existed for too long, and they had even begun to petrify, so they must be Dao Ancestors who fell a long time ago.

Therefore, these Dao Ancestors are the native Dao Ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm!

"Sure enough, before the Dao Mountain Realm, the era of cultivation civilization, there was a flourishing cultivation civilization! If this is the case, then the Devouring Clan is afraid that it really exists, and it has also destroyed the Dao Mountain Realm!"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

He then continued to investigate, but found no traces.

A long time ago, treasures should have been born here, which attracted the fighting of Dao Ancestors, and these fallen Dao Ancestors were undoubtedly losers, and they fell here, but the treasures on their bodies were taken away, leaving only corpses.

Swish!

Ye Tian took away the five corpses, and then left the Dragon Snake Forbidden Land.

Not long after, Ye Tian had already returned to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

......

Windy Mountain.

Ye Tian entered here and saw Jinchen Dao Ancestor and them, as for the Wind Mountain Lord who was in retreat, he did not appear.

However, Jinchen Daozu appeared as an incarnation, and his body was still investigating in the Daoshan Realm.

"Jinchen Daozu, I have made a big discovery!"

Ye Tian took out the corpses of the five Dao Ancestors and put them in front of the Jinchen Dao Ancestor: "This is the corpse of the five six- and seven-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestors that I took out from the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land, they have existed for a very long time and have been petrified. But before, the strongest Dao Ancestor in the Dao Mountain Realm was only the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor. Therefore, I guess that these five corpses of Dao Ancestors are Dao Ancestors of a civilized era before the Dao Mountain Realm. I'm afraid, your previous guess is true!"

Jinchen Dao Ancestor's face was solemn, and he carefully examined the five Dao Ancestor corpses, confirming that their existence was indeed incomparably long, and they were not forged corpses.

"I'm in trouble, I've found a little clue in my body, and I'll be back later!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor Dao.

Soon after, Jinchen Daozu returned.

A few days later.

Ye Tian and Jinchen Dao Ancestor, Yan Crack Dao Ancestor, Wind Void Dao Ancestor, Stygian Sea Dao Ancestor, as well as the Heavenly Emperor Palace's Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, Xuan Turtle Palace Lord, Sky Palace Lord, and Heavenly Punishment Palace Master, started a meeting together.

At the meeting, Ye Tian took out the five Dao Ancestor corpses again.

And Jinchen Dao Ancestor took out an ancient classic book and some weapon fragments, and other Dao Ancestors also took out some things or Dao Ancestor corpses one after another.

"Judging from what everyone has collected, the Dao Mountain Realm did give birth to a powerful cultivation civilization before this, perhaps inferior to the Divine Heaven Realm, but there are quite a few Sixth or Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and there are even invincible Dao Ancestors. "

Jin Chen Daozu spoke.

Everyone's expressions were not good-looking, who knew that the Dao Mountain Realm had a Devouring Clan force, who could not panic?

At the beginning, the Devouring Clan of the Divine Heaven Realm had created a great disaster for the Divine Heaven Realm, and the domain ancestors who died in battle were all in the double digits.

If the Devouring Clan of the Dao Mountain Realm had a Domain Ancestor, then they would not be able to compete with it, unless a Domain Ancestor was also born on their side.

However, how could the Domain Ancestor be born so easily?

"Based on the current evidence, there is indeed a Devouring Clan force in the Daoshan Realm, but the specific strength is unknown. The result we are most looking forward to at the moment is that most of the Devouring Clan entered the Dark Forbidden Realm and did not return, leaving only a weaker group of Devourers. "

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord looked forward to it.

"The top priority is to find this group of Devouring Clans, and then confirm their strength, if their strength is far superior to ours, then wait and don't clash with them! If they are not strong, then destroy them at all costs!"

"The Devourer should be hiding inside a special world, just like the small realm of your Black Wind Mountain, which is usually difficult to find. At the beginning, the Devouring Clan of the Divine Heaven Realm was very hidden, and the Domain Ancestors also spent a huge price to find the headquarters of the Devouring Clan, so as to start a war with them, and paid a huge price to destroy the headquarters of the Devouring Clan, and almost wiped out the Devouring Clan! We may have some difficulty finding the hiding place of the Devouring Clan, unless we can track down a Devourer!"

"The premise of tracking down the Devouring Clan also needs to find a Devouring Clan, those three Devouring Clans in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm have no connection with the Devouring Clan in the Daoshan Realm, so they can't be counted on!"

"Do you have any way? Whoever has a way to put it forward, if it costs a lot, everyone is willing to share some of it, and you will not suffer. "

Then.

The Xuan Tortoise Palace Lord of the Heavenly Emperor Palace spoke: "In this way, I am willing to peel off the Xuan Tortoise shell on my body and divide it into fragments, which can be integrated into one universe after another. Once a Devourer devours the universe, it will inevitably devour the fragments of my turtle shell. With the devouring ability of devouring, it will take a long time to digest my turtle shell, and I can track the whereabouts of the other party through special induction, so as to determine the location of the other party!

"Yes!"

Jin Chen Daozu agreed.

Immediately, the Xuan Turtle Palace Lord discussed compensation with several half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm of Black Wind Mountain, and in the end, Black Wind Mountain was willing to pay some of the scales of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle and three precious forbidden treasures, as well as treasures to repair the flesh.

In the following days, the Xuan Turtle Palace Master divided his Xuan Turtle Shell into 100,000 parts and sent them into the 100,000 universes of the Dao Mountain Realm.

Of course, there are far more than 100,000 universes in the Daoshan Realm, and there are even more than 100,000 fractions, but as long as these 100,000 Xuan Turtle Shell Fragments are sent into these universes, they are scattered in the major territories of the Daoshan Realm.

Once the Devourers devour the universe, they will always devour the universe containing the fragments of the turtle shell.

Therefore, the half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain only had to wait.

And just like that, day by day.

Since the Devourer only occasionally devoured the universe, after all, the other party also needed time to consume the universe, the world, and the Chaos Continent, so it would not be devoured all the time.

In the blink of an eye, 30,000 years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's forbidden body had greatly improved, and it had been refined to the level of ninety percent.

In addition, after cultivating the Extreme Dao Inheritance, he has made great progress in his physical body, forbidden Dao power, and soul.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian was now comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.
